channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Closed road on hartland rd, 20th March
item.description:
The bollards have been stolen and various LTN signs defaced
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartland Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress, 20th March
item.description:
This spot is fly tipped daily

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes, 20th March
item.description:
Potholes in road likely to pop tires
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaking water pipe, 20th March
item.description:
This pipe is seriously leaking. It is located behind the Information Centre in Kelsey Park. The water is turned off on the pipe which means the Information Centre has no water. It has been like this for a week. The pipe needs to be repaired.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Park Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 20th March
item.description:
Dumped rubbish on Ravensworth rd. Junction with Widecombe rd, near mini roundabout.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widecombe Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on Melon Road again, 20th March
item.description:
Rubbish on Melon Road. Also reported on March 10th, 16th & 19th. The rubbish is then removed, but will be back within the next couple of days. Can the council find a solution here as this is an occurring issue?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Melon Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building rubble on stretch of road, 20th March
item.description:
It looks like building rubble has been dropped- probably accidentally from a vehicle - along Lyndhurst Way outside no 87-91 and also at the junction turning left onto Lyndhurst Way - outside No. 84. This is a hazard for traffic using these streets and also causing dust pollution as cars move through it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 106, Lyndhurst Grove, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised and loose paving stone. Woman tripped on this and fell over today., 20th March
item.description:
Raised and loose paving stone causing people to trip and fall

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hervey Close, Church End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left after tenents left, 20th March
item.description:
There are 3 wheelie bins which are all overflowing with general rubbish and several black sacks on the ground this has been there for 4 weeks now and looks unsightly please can this all be removed as no one is living there at the moment
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandpiper Drive, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the pavement between Marshall Court and St Leger Court, 20th March
item.description:
Flytipped divan bed base, appeared within the last 24 hours

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Builder's waste on footpath, 20th March
item.description:
Three bags of builder's waste dumped on footpath

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Canberra Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and glass is constantly dumped here on the corner of Mina Rs and Old Kent Rd, 20th March
item.description:
As soon as rubbish is cleared it is put there again - often including broken glass. An we have litter bins, warning signs about dumping rubbish and maybe a CCTV camera on this spot which is a constant eye sore, danger to health and just disgusting to me and many neighbours in the street. This has been ongoing for many months - maybe years.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees/Shrubs causing dangerous obstruction on bridleway, has bang his head due to low tree branches. pathway is on the playground side of five aches., 20th March
item.description:
Trees/Shrubs causing dangerous obstruction on bridleway, has bang his head due to low tree branches. pathway is on the playground side of five aches.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riverside Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole, 20th March
item.description:
Tarmac missing from around drains. Metal edges on show
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, High Street, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car still here, 20th March
item.description:
Dumped car still here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Derby Hill Crescent, Forest Hill, Greater London

item.title: Dumped rubbish next to the tree, 20th March
item.description:
Rubbish has been dumped here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abanded vehicle, registration SP57ZLX, 20th March
item.description:
Abandoned vehicle, could be stolen and dumped. By reporting this hopefully it gets reunited with its owner Registration SP57 ZLX
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bedonwell Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned, untaxed and no MOT. Blue Mercedes van., 20th March
item.description:
This dumped van has been parked here for months. No tax/MOT. If vehicles are left in this area and not removed, it seems to attract others!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Letchworth Drive, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Colin fisher funerals cotmandene cres 1 p/hole adj central island, 20th March
item.description:
Colin fisher funerals cotmandene cres 1 p/hole adj central island
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 105-107, Cotmandene Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown Footpath, 20th March
item.description:
Footpath number 19 is overgrown with weeds This needs urgent attention and clearing asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crusoe Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
